title: Weighted Mazes, Dijkstra, Heaps, and A* · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed puzzle review reconstructs weighted mazes, dijkstra, heaps, and a* from revision, configuration, seed, topology, frontier, predecessor map, state transition, draw record, accessibility report, profile, artifact, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for weighted Dijkstra and A-star comparison engine after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define nonnegative passage costs, units, blocked edges, accumulated route cost, and the player meaning of weight.
Relax an edge only through a lower tentative cost and finalize vertices under the nonnegative-weight contract.
Push improved priorities and reject stale heap entries by comparing popped and recorded costs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

The record names the assumption, applies Weighted Evidence, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Weighted Evidence record says weighted Dijkstra and A-star comparison engine looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Weighted Evidence.

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Weighted Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Weighted Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review puzzle team handles case 7590 during a low-vision player session. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate weighted relaxation, heap staleness, heuristic limits, route cost, and optimality; native Tk behavior must not be inferred from browser execution; then inject one invalid wall, stale callback, or corrupted field and reject it. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Compare route validity, total cost, expansions, frontier peak, heuristic zero case, unreachable case, and changed weights.

Evidence target: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Weighted Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieving Weighted Evidence through the concrete weighted Dijkstra and A-star comparison engine case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Weighted Evidence, keep Weighted Evidence connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Compare route validity, total cost, expansions, frontier peak, heuristic zero case, unreachable case, and changed weights.
